title: Creating an Assignment in Teams
what_it_is: Assignment creation is setting up a piece of work in Teams Assignments, so learners can see instructions, attach their own files and submit in one place.
why_use_it: It keeps instructions, submissions and feedback together in one place, rather than spread across email, paper and separate folders.
how_to: Open the Assignments tab in your Team.
Add a title and clear instructions for what learners need to do.
Attach any files learners need, and add a rubric if you're using one.
Set a due date, then select Assign to publish it to the group.
